perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white camisole and blue denim jeans, is leaning over a table in a room filled with stacked cardboard boxes. She is focused on signing a stack of photos or posters with a black marker. (2) She picks up a poster from a pile on the left, signs it with a quick motion, and then stacks it onto a growing pile on the right. (3) This repetitive motion of signing and stacking continues throughout the entire duration of the video, with her maintaining a calm and dedicated facial expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio environment is dominated by the rhythmic, repetitive sounds of a marker tip scratching across paper. (2) This is accompanied by the soft swishing and rustling sounds of paper being moved and stacked. (3) No background music, vocals, or distinct speech are detected; only the ambient sound of the activity and the quiet indoor environment are present.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Hook Text: "當其他人都下班只剩我在加班" (When everyone else is off work and only I am working overtime). The tone is hardworking and intended to create a relatable, diligent persona.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Constant signing and stacking of merchandise posters.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white spaghetti-strap camisole and blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor storage or workspace filled with numerous stacked brown cardboard boxes. Some boxes have generic text or markings.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves to demonstrate the hard work and dedication of the individual, likely an influencer or artist, by showing them personally signing a large volume of fan merchandise or promotional materials after hours. It aims to foster a sense of intimacy and appreciation among the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The person is signing physical photographs or posters of themselves, which constitutes self-promotion or promotion of specific merchandise.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a common social media trope of showing behind-the-scenes 'hustle' to humanize the creator and increase the perceived value of their signed products.
